content:
Oh wow! This clash really made me laugh. 😂 (I won't say why or else that would spoil it for others ;)

I did manage to figure out the puzzle on my own under 60 seconds, so don't worry about it being too hard. Nice clash, and I'll approve once you change the state of this clash!
pretty nice, one thing 16X16 is a bit on the nose.

Thanks! I might change that test case; however, as I don't have much feedback from real human beings at the moment, I can't tell if it wouldn't be too hard without it.
Though some LLMs weren't able to figure it out.
